source_note: Deterministic source-level command-catalog coverage ledger for WIN-CONCEPT-001. Regenerate with --regenerate. Every catalog row in site/prototype-features.json binds to a real .uno command registration in the officecfg Office/UI/*Commands.xcu files; 0 rows may be unresolved. It proves the catalog is a faithful subset of the officecfg registrations; it is not a claim of a native Features surface, a successful build, rendered pixels, Run-command dispatch, localization, or any runtime evidence.

proposed_fixture.note: The native Features .ui surface and the Run-command UNO dispatch are the separate B/V gate; this ledger is the source-level M-gate coverage contract only.
